products.name: Golden Oval Pearl Set
products.desc: Elevate your elegance with this golden oval pearl jewelry set. Featuring a vintage-style 18K gold plated necklace and matching freshwater pearl stud earrings. Tarnish-free and hypoallergenic.

products.name: Gold & Pearl Geometric Set
products.desc: Bold meets elegant in this gold and mother-of-pearl jewelry set, featuring a statement square pendant and matching geometric earrings. Crafted with 18K gold plating and freshwater pearl accents.

products.name: Bold Gold Link Hoop
products.desc: Make a bold statement with this contemporary gold link hoop earring. Designed for everyday elegance with a tarnish-free 18K gold plated finish. Modern minimalism at its best.

products.name: Minimalist Black & Gold Set
products.desc: Elegant black and gold jewelry set featuring a matching necklace and stud earrings. Features AAA gemstones and 18K gold plated stainless steel. Tarnish-free for lasting brilliance.

products.name: Vintage Bold Gold Hoop
products.desc: Statement vintage-style gold hoop earrings with a bold, round design. 18K gold plated and 100% tarnish-free.

products.name: Radiant Pearl Burst
products.desc: Bold gold burst earrings with freshwater pearl centers, paired with daintly AAA gemstones — perfect for modern luxury looks.

products.name: The Golden Halo
products.desc: A sleek, minimalist 18K gold plated pendant necklace that adds timeless elegance to any look. Tarnish-free and perfect for daily wear.

products.name: Red Ruby Pendant
products.desc: A striking gold chain necklace featuring a vibrant AAA ruby-red gemstone for a bold and classic finish. 18K gold plated.

products.name: Purple Pendant Necklace
products.desc: Add a pop of color and elegance to your everyday style with our Purple Pendant Necklace, featuring AAA gemstones and tarnish-free 18K gold plating.

products.name: Emerald Pendant Necklace
products.desc: Bring timeless elegance to life with our Emerald Pendant Necklace — designed to sparkle with AAA gemstones. Crafted for comfort with 18K gold plating.
